expectations.text: Output .pptx file exists and is valid
expectations.evidence: Line 926: const outputPath = resolve(__dirname, 'digital-transformation.pptx'); Line 927: await pres.writeFile({ fileName: outputPath }). Uses pptxgenjs writeFile to generate valid PPTX.

expectations.text: Uses renderVerticalGradientBar or equivalent for left accent bars (not solid fill rectangles)
expectations.evidence: Slide 2 challenge cards (line 383-390) use gradientBarPng images for left accent bars, which is a gradient image approach (passes). However, slide 4 outcome cards (lines 797-804) use solid fill rectangles: s4.addShape(pres.shapes.RECTANGLE, { x: ox, y: oy, w: 0.06, h: ocH, fill: { color: oc.accentColor } }). This is a solid fill rectangle, not a gradient bar. Inconsistent — fails because not all left accent bars use gradient rendering.

expectations.text: Uses FaArrowRight icons (not LINE shapes with endArrowType) for timeline arrows
expectations.evidence: Line 10: FaArrowRight imported from react-icons/fa. Lines 674-686: const arrowIcon = await iconToBase64Png(FaArrowRight, ...) used for timeline arrow connectors. No LINE shapes or endArrowType found in the file.

expectations.text: Callout bar uses matching tint color from Carbon palette
expectations.evidence: Two callout bars found: Line 436: fill: { color: 'FFF1F1' } with line: { color: C.red60 } — red tint matches the red-themed challenge slide. Line 865: fill: { color: 'F0F5FF' } with line: { color: C.blue60 } — blue tint matches the blue-themed outcomes slide. Both tints match their respective accent colors.

expectations.text: Font sizes are 9pt or larger throughout
expectations.evidence: Smallest fontSize values: 9 (line 637, phase subtitles), 10 (lines 282, 482, 701), 10.5 (lines 656, 851, 898). All font sizes are >= 9pt.

Lines 73-80: const cardShadow = () => ({ ... }); Lines 82-88: const softShadow = () => ({ ... }). Both are arrow functions returning fresh objects. Used at lines 380, 438, 577, 794 (cardShadow()) and lines 438, 867 (softShadow()) consistently.
